name: Doodle God: Good Old Times
author: Poki
description: Doodle God: Good Old Times is the lastest version in the Doodle God series. In this version you explore the history of humanity. Mix your elements and create castles, knights and complete armies! Can you combine every element in Doodle God: Good Old Times? How to play: Combine elements in different combinations to create new elements, and advance the entire world! About the creator:  Doodle God: Good Old Times was created by Joybits. They are known for the Doodle God series!
